[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person stands leaning against a white car in a covered parking area with visible ceiling pipes and lighting overhead. 

Main Subject:
A person in a dark short-sleeve shirt and light blue jeans stands next to the front-right side of a white car, one hand near their head and the other holding a phone or small object near their waist, while leaning slightly toward the car. The car faces the camera, with a black front grille area, angular headlights, and black front bumper details.

Setting:
The scene is indoors in a parking garage or covered structure. The ceiling has multiple large red and dark pipes running horizontally, along with smaller white and gray pipes, hanging fixtures, and cable-like lines. Rows of windows or vents with horizontal slats appear in the background. The lighting is bright and even, suggesting artificial illumination. The floor is concrete with a yellow parking line near the car.

Visual Details:
The white car has dark-tinted windows and black wheels. A yellow rectangular marker or block is visible on the right side near the car. The person has short dark hair and is looking downward and slightly toward the car. Their dark shirt has a light graphic on the chest area, and they wear light-colored shoes. The camera angle is slightly low and front-facing, focusing on the car’s front and the person beside it.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected. The only partial characters appear on the left wall but are unclear.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person posing beside the front of a white car in an indoor parking garage. Overhead pipes and concrete parking lines are visible in the background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man in a black t-shirt with a graphic print and light-wash jeans leans against a white BMW sedan in an underground parking garage. He has dark, styled hair and is wearing glasses, with his right hand touching his hair and his left hand holding his phone. The car is positioned at an angle, showing its front and side profile. The parking garage has a concrete floor with yellow painted lines, and a pillar with blue markings indicating "P" and "11 T.03 11". Overhead, there are exposed pipes, some painted red and gray, along with lighting fixtures. In the background, another car and some wooden structures are visible. The lighting is somewhat dim, typical of an indoor parking area, casting soft shadows. The overall mood is casual and urban.
